Responsive images: srcset, <picture>, WebP & AVIF

(A) Multi-descriptor srcset — expect largest (1440w) picked

(B) <picture> — AVIF → WebP → SVG fallback

(C) .webp / .avif extension parsing

These point at relative paths that end in .webp/.avif and therefore 404 offline (broken images). They exist only to exercise the scanner's extension/type handling — the URL string is what matters.
